q1.question: How can I create a group chat?
q1.answer: Go to Groups tab, tap +, enter group name, and add members.

q2.question: How can I find and join a hotspot?
q2.answer: Open Hotspots tab, pick a location on map, then join nearby conversations.

q3.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
q3.answer: Tap Forgot Password on the sign-in screen and follow instructions.

q4.question: How can I block a user?
q4.answer: Open user profile, tap menu (3 dots), then choose Block User.

q5.question: The app feels slow. What should I do?
q5.answer: Restart app, clear cache, and update to the latest version.

q6.question: How can I report an inappropriate message?
q6.answer: Long-press the message, choose Report, and describe the issue.

q7.question: How can I invite friends to the app?
q7.answer: Open Invitations tab and share invite link or select contacts.

q8.question: How can I use hashtags?
q8.answer: Type # followed by a keyword in chat or post to create/search hashtag.
